title: Fairy Non Bio PODS Washing Liquid Laundry Capsules 76 Washes (4x19) , Platinum, With Extra Stain Removal & Brighter Whites, For Sensitive Skin
features: Discover the strength and care of Fairy Non Bio Platinum PODS: Fairy's best softness (vs other Fairy Non Bio detergents Platinum PODS vs Fairy PODS) now with Extra Stain Removal
Voted No.1 Laundry Brand for Sensitive Skin (Online panel of 3327 females among which Fairy Non Bio detergent was voted most often as the No.1 detergent for sensitive skin)
Discover the gentle care of Fairy Non Bio PODS Washing Liquid Capsules, with hygienic clean and Fairy best softness (vs other Fairy Non Bio detergents)
Try Fairy Sensitive Skin Dream Team: Fairy Non Bio Platinum PODS + Fairy Freh Fabric Conditioner, for extra clean (vs Fairy Base PODS) and extra softness (vs detergent alone)
description: Product Description With Bold All-in-1 PODS washing liquid capsules laundry detergent Exotic Bloom, make your journey irresistibly joyful with notes of fresh greens and white florals surrounded by hints of fruity peach. Bold All-in-1 PODS have a unique three-chamber design as well as built-in fabric softener – for cleaner, fresher and softer feeling clothes than ever before. WARNING! This product may be harmful and could cause serious injury. Always keep Bold All-in-1 PODS washing capsules laundry detergent out of reach of children. Visit keepcapsfromkids.eu for more information. Ingredients >30% Anionic Surfactants, 5-15% Soap, <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Phosphonates, Enzymes, Optical Brighteners, Perfumes, Citronellol, Eugenol Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
